bits.name: cfg_msadc_mode
bits.comment: 1'b1: hardware mode auto test; 1'b0: software mode;

bits.name: cfg_msadc_hw_test_channel
bits.comment: 1'b1: 2 channels; 1'b0: 1 channel

bits.name: cfg_msadc_auto_mode_en
bits.comment: 1'b1: enable; 1'b0: disable

bits.name: cfg_msadc_auto_mode_iir_en
bits.comment: 1'b1: enable; 1'b0: disable

bits.name: cfg_msadc_sw_start_pulse
bits.comment: Start pulse, write 1'b1 to generate one cycle pulse

bits.name: cfg_msadc_sw_stop_pulse
bits.comment: Stop pulse, write 1'b1 to generate one cycle pulse

bits.name: cfg_msadc_sw_clear_pulse
bits.comment: Clear pulse, write 1'b1 to generate one cycle pulse

bits.name: cfg_msadc_sw_mux_bits
bits.comment: msadc meter mux bits when software mode

bits.name: cfg_msadc_test_0_mux_bits
bits.comment: msadc meter mux bits when power off

bits.name: cfg_msadc_test_1_mux_bits
bits.comment: msadc meter mux bits when power off

bits.name: cfg_msadc_wait_cnt
bits.comment: msadc meter wait counter

bits.name: cfg_msadc_window
bits.comment: msadc meter window

bits.name: cfg_msadc_sw_diff_mode
bits.comment: msadc diff mode

bits.name: ro_msadc_dat_acc
bits.comment: read only, msadc acc vaule when software

bits.name: ro_msadc_test_acc_0
bits.comment: read only, msadc acc vaule when power off

bits.name: ro_msadc_test_acc_1
bits.comment: read only, msadc acc vaule when power off

bits.name: cfg_msadc_done_int_raw
bits.comment: masdc meaturement done interrupt raw status, write 1'b1 to clear

bits.name: cfg_msadc_above_th_int_raw
bits.comment: masdc meaturement above threshold interrupt raw status, write 1'b1 to clear

bits.name: cfg_msadc_below_th_int_raw
bits.comment: masdc meaturement below threshold interrupt raw status, write 1'b1 to clear

bits.name: cfg_msadc_done_int_status
bits.comment: masdc meaturement done interrupt status, write 1'b1 to clear

bits.name: cfg_msadc_above_th_int_status
bits.comment: masdc meaturement above threshold interrupt status, write 1'b1 to clear

bits.name: cfg_msadc_below_th_int_status
bits.comment: masdc meaturement below threshold interrupt status, write 1'b1 to clear

bits.name: cfg_msadc_done_int_mask
bits.comment: masdc meaturement done interrupt mask

bits.name: cfg_msadc_above_th_int_mask
bits.comment: masdc meaturement above threshold interrupt mask

bits.name: cfg_msadc_below_th_int_mask
bits.comment: masdc meaturement below threshold interrupt mask

bits.name: cfg_msadc_hi_th
bits.comment: msadc meaturement high threshold.

bits.name: cfg_msadc_lo_th
bits.comment: msadc meaturement low threshold.
